series_metadata.series_description: This series contains information used to implement a BWC Transitional Work Program by an employer and it includes but is not limited to the following: Transitional Work Grant Agreement, Reimbursement Request, Policy Number, and Narrative from transitional work developers, Transitional Work Manual, BWC review, checklist, correspondence, and email and finance statement from the BWC Fiscal Department. The Transitional Work Grant Program Files are scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS). The Universal Document Service (UDS) is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Transitional Work Grant Program Files are scanned into Universal Document Service (UDS). original Transitional Work Grant Program Files in office BWC audit has been released, and ; Electronic: Transitional Work Grant Program Files are scanned into Universal Document Service (UDS).
